title: Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura
tagline: Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura — spiritual town of Karnataka

heroImage.alt: Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura, Karnataka

overview.short: The Gunja Narasima Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple in Tirumakudal Narasipura, a town in the Mysore district, Karnataka state, India.
overview.description: The Gunja Narasima Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple in Tirumakudal Narasipura, a town in the Mysore district, Karnataka state, India. The town is located 20 miles south east of the historically important city of Mysore. The temple dates back to about the 16th rule of the Vijayanagara Empire and is built in typical dravidian style with an imposing gopura (tower) over the entrance gate (mahadwara) and a four pillared mantapa ("hall") in front of the sanctum. The temple is located at the confluence of the Kaveri river and the Kabini river and is considered sacred by Hindus.

topPlaces.name: Thirumakudalu Narasipura
topPlaces.description: Tirumakudalu Narasipura (Tirumakūḍalu Narasīpura) the temple city of Karnataka, commonly known as T. Narasipura or T.N. Pura, is a town in Mysore district in the Indian state of Karnataka. The city is a Taluk of Mysore district and 32 km south-east of the district headquarters and has five Hobli centers.

topPlaces.name: Kabini River
topPlaces.description: The Kabini River is one of the major tributaries of the river Cauvery in southern India, It originates in Wayanad district of Kerala state by the confluence of the Panamaram River and the Mananthavady River. It flows eastward through Wayanad district, entering Mysore district of Karnataka, to join the Kaveri River in Mysore district of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Byrapura
topPlaces.description: Byrapura is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Tirumakudal Narsipur taluk of Mysore district.

topPlaces.name: Sosale
topPlaces.description: Sosale is a small village near T.Narsipur in the Mysore district of Karnataka province in India.

topPlaces.name: Musuvinakoppalu
topPlaces.description: Musuvinakoppalu is a village in T. Narasipura taluk of Mysuru district in southern state Karnataka in India. This village is the headquarters of Muttalavadi Grama Panchayath in Sosale holbali in T. Narasipura Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Bannur
topPlaces.description: Bannur is a municipality in T.Narasipura Taluk, Mysore district in the state of Karnataka, India. It is located at 12.33°N 76.86°E / 12.33; 76.86.

topPlaces.name: Chennakeshava Temple, Somanathapura
topPlaces.description: The Chennakesava Temple, also referred to as Chennakeshava Temple and Keshava Temple, is a Vaishnava Hindu temple on the banks of River Kaveri at Somanathapura, Mysuru, Karnataka, India. The temple was consecrated in 1258 CE by Somanatha Dandanayaka, a general of the Hoysala King Narasimha III. It is located 38 kilometres (24 mi) east of Mysuru city.

topPlaces.name: Somanathapura
topPlaces.description: Somanathapura, also spelled Somnathpur temple or Somanathpura is a town in T Narasipura Taluk, Mysore district in the state of Karnataka in India. It is located 38 kilometres (24 mi) from Keshava Temple at Somanathapura (Also called Keshava temple).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura?
faq.a: Stays in Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gunja Narasimha Swamy Temple, Thirumakudalu Narasipura?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thirumakudalu Narasipura, Kabini River, Byrapura, Sosale, Musuvinakoppalu.
